title: The Park Begins to Collapse
description: On pages 17–18, the park begins to collapse focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.
scene: On pages 17–18, the park begins to collapse focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UARY, Zoro, Usoppp and Salji's resting room and bedroom. It's bloody fatty, but since they're boys, they don't mind.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
